results.title: Noida airport opens with IndiGo arrival
results.description: Noida International Airport has commenced flight operations. Its first IndiGo flight arrived from Lucknow and then departed back to the Uttar Pradesh capital. This marks a significant step for air connectivity in the region. The new airport aims to boost travel and economic development. It is designed as a multimodal transport hub.

results.title: Guyana’s oil boom among factors behind Goldman Sachs’ lower 2027 crude price forecast
results.description: June 12 (Reuters) – Guyana’s rapidly expanding oil production is among the factors expected to contribute to lower global crude prices in the coming years, according to a new forecast from Goldman Sachs, which on Thursday reduced its average Brent crude price outlook for 2027 to US$80 per barrel. The bank cited rising supplies from [...] The post Guyana’s oil boom among factors behind Goldman Sachs’ lower 2027 crude price forecast appeared first on Kaieteur News .
